✨ Open Source App

AppleSpell

A beautiful native macOS app for managing your local dictionary. Control how your Mac corrects words.

⬇️ Download Latest 🐙 View on GitHub

Powerful Features

Everything you need to manage your local dictionary

🔍

Search & Filter

Quickly find words in your dictionary with instant search and filtering

➕

Easy Add

Add single or multiple words at once. Support batch import

🗑️

Simple Remove

Delete words with swipe or button. Remove multiple at once

📥

Import Words

Import words from text files. Support plain text format

📤

Export Words

Export words to share with others. One word per line

⚡

Auto Refresh

Automatically refresh when dictionary changes externally

Screenshots

Clean and modern interface designed for macOS

Installation

Get started in minutes

1

Download the latest release from GitHub

2

Open the .dmg file

3

Drag AppleSpell to Applications

4

Launch and enjoy!

CLI Tool

Prefer command line? Use the localdic CLI tool

# Install via Homebrew
brew tap ssbun/formulae
brew install localdic

# List all words
localdic list

# Add words
localdic learn ffmpeg llvm swift

# Remove words
localdic forget ffmpeg
